data.title: Adobe Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
Bank Of America Raises Bullish Outlook On US Brokers, Exchanges, Alternative Investments: 3 Top Picks For 2025
data.description: Bank of America bullish on U.S. brokers, asset managers and exchanges for 2025. Red wave in 2024 to open doors for crypto and alts. Blue Owl, IBKR and TW top picks; HOOD and SCHW underperformers.

data.title: Exxon Mobil's 2030 Plan: $20 Billion Earnings Boost, Cash Surge, Emissions Goals & More
data.description: Exxon Mobil unveils 2030 plan to increase earnings and cash flow, aiming for 10% CAGR in earnings and 8% in cash flow growth, while reducing reinvestment rate.
